zh.lifeSummary: 當Piers de Geneville於1256年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，他的父親Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville30歲，母親Maud de Lacy33歲。他於1283年10月11日之前與Jeanne de Lusignan在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年6月8日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年36歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Piers de Geneville于1256年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville30岁，母亲Maud de Lacy33岁。他于1283年10月11日之前与Jeanne de Lusignan在英国英格兰史洛普爾盧德洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年6月8日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年36岁，埋葬在法国波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Piers de Geneville was born in 1256, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, his father, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, was 30 and his mother, Maud de Lacy, was 33. He married Jeanne de Lusignan before 11 October 1283, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 June 1292, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 36, and was buried in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Piers de Geneville est né en 1256, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lacy, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Lusignan avant 11 octobre 1283, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1292, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Piers de Geneville 1256 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville 30 und seine Mutter Maud de Lacy 33. Er hat vor 11. Oktober 1283 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Jeanne de Lusignan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1292 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Piers de Geneville è nato il nel 1256 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Lacy, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Lusignan prima del 11 ottobre 1283, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1292, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Piers de Genevilleが1256年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Genevilleは30歳，母Maud de Lacyは33歳であった。1283年10月11日以前にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウでJeanne de Lusignanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年6月8日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで36歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンモントモーイロンコウheにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Piers de Geneville(이)가 1256년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Lacy(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1283년 10월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 Jeanne de Lusignan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 6월 8일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 몽모릴런 코우he에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Piers de Geneville nasceu em 1256, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Lacy, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Lusignan antes 11 de outubro de 1283, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1292, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Piers de Geneville родился в 1256 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lacy, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Lusignan перед 11 октябрь 1283 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 июня 1292 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности коухe, монтмориллон, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Piers de Geneville nació en 1256, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud de Lacy, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Lusignan antes de 11 de octubre de 1283, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1292, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
